title: Yoga Teaching Archive
metaDescription: Archive of Patricia Smith's Yoga teaching (2009–2021). She now practices Touch for Health Kinesiology and Nutrition in Golden Bay.

blocks.text: A legacy portfolio of Yoga teaching

blocks.html: From 2009 to 2021 Patricia taught accessible Hatha-based Yoga for physical, mental and emotional wellbeing — community classes, private sessions, corporate and school programmes. She paused teaching to focus fully on Touch for Health Kinesiology and Nutrition.
These pages remain as a record of that chapter of her practice. They are not an active class timetable or booking offer.
Looking for a session today? See Touch for Health Kinesiology, book online, or call Patricia.
